message:
Add consistent dialog visibility waits in spotlight tests

Four tests were filling the search input without first waiting for the
dialog to be visible, which could cause flaky tests on slower systems:
- "arrow keys navigate results"
- "Enter key copies selected prompt"
- "shows 'No results' for empty search"
- "clicking result item selects it"

Now all tests consistently wait for dialog visibility before interacting,
matching the pattern used in "typing shows search results" and other tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
